history.insight: Day one on the tracker — and you're already nearly a third of the way there. At 5,843 words, you've laid strong groundwork covering PAD, diabetes, the inflammatory landscape, and macrophage biology. With 148 days until September 1st, you only need around 82 words per day to hit 18,000. That's less than a solid paragraph. The hard part isn't the pace — it's showing up. The fact that you're tracking it is a good sign.
